rag_rules: Place component type assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Use visible identifiers and feature names in type-level contracts
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Use eq, const, assume, and guarantee syntax for valid AGREE expressions
Component type contracts should reference visible inputs and outputs only
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use eq name : type = expression; for equation declarations
Use const name : type = value; for constant declarations
anti_patterns: Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent ports in type-level contracts
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
Implementation-level bindings and subcomponent port usage
